title: Battle of Fresia
content:
{{Top|canon=Rescue of Incom personnel}} {{Conjecture|legends}} {{Citation}} {{Battle |prev=[[Battle on Wayland]]''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]'' |conc= |next=[[Space Battle in the Kessel Asteroid Field]] |image=[[File:Fresian_Facility.jpg]] |name=Battle of Fresia |conflict=[[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] ([[Fresian campaign]]) |date=[[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]]''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'' |place=[[Fresia/Legends|Fresia]] |result=*Decisive [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] victory **[[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing starfighters]] become the Alliance's primary starfighter. |side1=[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] |side2=Alliance to Restore the Republic |side3= |side4= |commanders1= |commanders2=[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Raymus Antilles/Legends|Raymus Antilles]] |commanders3= |commanders4= |unit1= |unit2= |unit3= |unit4= |forces1= *5 [[Bp.2 anti-infantry turret]]s *2 [[Bp.4 anti-vehicle turret]]s *8 [[Bp.5 anti-aircraft turret]]s *2 [[XX-10 turbolaser tower]]s *[[Desert stormtrooper/Legends|Sandtroopers]] *2 [[Scout trooper/Legends|Scout troopers]] *2 [[74-Z speeder bike/Legends|74-Z speeder bikes]] *7 [[TIE ap-1|TIE maulers]] *12 [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|AT-ST walkers]] *1 [[DSS-02 shield generator/Legends|DSS-02 shield generator]] |forces2= *[[Rebel trooper/Legends|Rebel troopers]] *[[T2-B Repulsor Tank/Legends|T2-B repulsor tanks]] *5 [[Rebel pilot/Legends|Rebel pilots]] *4 liberated T-65 X-wing starfighters {{C|late battle}} *[[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|BTL Y-wing starfighters]] |forces3= |forces4= |casual1=Heavy |casual2=Light |casual3= |casual4= |civilian= }} {{Quote|Time to retire those Z-95s! These X-wings should be able to handle anything the Empire can send at us!|[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Raymus Antilles/Legends|Raymus Antilles]]|}} The '''Battle of Fresia''' was a decisive engagement early in the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] in [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Fresia/Legends|Fresia]]. During the raid, the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] managed to recover plans, data, and prototypes for the [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] starfighter, which would become a crucial part of the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Alliance Fleet]]. ==Prelude== {{Quote|There's no alarm on any Imperial comm channel. We're clear. Move out, team.|Captain Raymus Antilles, upon reaching Fresia with the Alliance task force|}} When dissident [[Incom Corporation/Legends|Incom Corporation]] scientists provided the Alliance with the location of four prototype X-wing starfighters on [[Fresia/Legends|Fresia]], a rebel [[Task force/Legends|task force]] was dispatched with the mission of retrieving them. Unanticipated complications arose when the [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer]] ''[[Tyranny]]'' was discovered in orbit around the planet. [[File:Rebel_Leaders.jpg|thumb|left|200px|The leaders of the Rebellion [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Ackbar]], [[Garm Bel Iblis/Legends|Garm Bel Iblis]], [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]] and [[Bail Prestor Organa/Legends|Bail Organa]] study the [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing starfighter]].]] An operation had to be conducted to lure the ''Tyranny'' back to its station at the [[Kuat/Legends|Kuat]] [[Shipyard/Legends|shipyards]], resulting in a [[Space Battle at Kuat|battle above the planet]]. Even after the success of that operation, the Alliance would still have an obstacle in getting to Fresia in the form of a defense network of sentry drones which were deployed by the ''Tyranny'' before it left the [[Fre'ji system]]. This final [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] defensive measure would be circumvented when the Rebels were able to steal landing codes from an Imperial uplink station on [[Wayland/Legends|Wayland]]. This was accomplished during the [[Battle on Wayland]] by a ground force escorting the [[Droid/Legends|droids]] [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] and [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]]. R2-D2 was able to register Alliance ships as attendees in the Incom [[Imperialization/Legends|nationalization]] ceremony. This allowed them to obtain clearance for landing upon reaching Fresia. A convoy carrying [[Rebel pilot/Legends|Rebel pilots]] had to travel through the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] controlled territory around Fresia to reach the X-wing storage area. The ploy to register the ships at Wayland succeeded, and the Alliance task force was cleared for landing without having to engage the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] in orbit. ==Battle== [[File:BattleofFresia.jpg|thumb|left|180px|Rebel forces assault the Imperial power generator.]] {{Quote|I reached the X-wing; Beginning power up sequence… Abort! Abort launch sequence! I'm detecting anti-aircraft turrets all over the area!''"
"''They're going to get destroyed out there! Take out those anti-aircraft turrets!|A Rebel pilot and Captain Raymus Antilles, alarmed upon the discovery of some concealed anti-aircraft turrets during the Battle of Fresia|}} The Incom facility holding the X-wings was located on a sandy archipelago, and the Alliance task force deployed in the south. The Rebels quickly punched through the Imperial garrison, which was completely taken by surprise. A heavy [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] defended the facility approach from the southeast, but the Rebels were able to trek through shallow waters to the western entrance of the facility, which was much more lightly defended. After deploying more troops and calling in a Y-wing bombing run on the Imperial base, the Alliance launched a full attack. The base [[Power generator/Legends|power generator]] was soon destroyed, after which the rest of the Imperial facility quickly followed suit, with an Imperial [[Model Edu A-34|officer academy]] and [[Model Com C-38|command center]] also being destroyed. Also, a small force of [[T2-B Repulsor Tank/Legends|tanks]] and infantry were deployed to defend the area between the turbolaser towers and the landing zone. As the Rebel pilots reached the location of the X-wing prototypes, a final effort was made by the Imperial forces to stop them with the landing of multiple [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|AT-ST walkers]] and [[TIE ap-1|TIE maulers]] and the revealing of some previously hidden [[Anti-aircraft gun|anti-aircraft turrets]], but these reinforcements were quickly overwhelmed by the Rebel ground forces and the Rebel pilots were able to blast off from Fresia and escape along with the rest of the Rebel task force. ==Aftermath== [[File:X-wing_prototypes.jpg|thumb|150px|Prototype [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] evacuate an Incom facility.]] {{Quote|The Incom T-65 X-wing is the fighter that killed the Death Star. An almost perfect balance of speed, maneuverability, and defensive shielding make it the fighter of choice for Rogue Squadron.|[[General/Legends|General]] [[Carlist Rieekan/Legends|Carlist Rieekan]]|[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron (video game)|''Star Wars: Rogue Squadron'']]}} The X-wing prototypes obtained from Fresia would lead the Alliance to begin full-scale production of X-wing starfighters, a design that would go on to serve with distinction throughout the rest of the Galactic Civil War and beyond. The X-wing would soon get its first opportunity to prove its worth at the [[Battle of Turkana/Legends|Battle of Turkana]], where it was able to defeat prototype Imperial [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE/IN starfighters]] of similar performance. Indeed, much of the later success of the Rebellion would be due to this superb fighter, eventually becoming the starfighter of choice for elite pilots such as [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]]. After the battle, Captain Antilles suggested to liberate Fresia and rid it of Imperial control. However, Mon Mothma countermanded this decision, stating that it would present too much of a target to the Empire and endanger the citizens of Fresia. ==Behind the scenes== This battle was the third mission of the Rebel campaign in the [[2006]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]''. Some have speculated that the raid on the Incom facility depicted in the comic, [[Star Wars: Empire: Darklighter|''Darklighter'']], is the Battle of Fresia. However, it is far more likely this was a later mission to acquire more X-wings. The planet is never named in ''Darklighter''. There are many more of the craft in the comic, and more than once it is implied that Incom is past the development stage and has started to manufacture the craft, while in ''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]'' there are only four prototypes in existence. Though, oddly, there are five in the illustration of the battle in ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''. There is also far less resistance in the comic. In ''Empire at War'', after the battle is won Captain Antilles wants to liberate Fresia. However, [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]] countermands this decision, stating that it would present too much of a target to the Empire. Despite this, the player can still opt to take control over the planet (and do so easily, as the planet is completely unguarded at this point). Also [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] and [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] can participate if the survivors of task force of the [[Battle on Wayland]] join the assault force of Fresia. ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]'' {{1st}} *{{StoryCite|story=The Farlander Papers|book=Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)}} {{1stm}} {{Imo}} *{{StoryCite|story=The Stele Chronicles|book=Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)}} {{Imo}} ==Sources== *''[[The Essential Guide to Vehicles and Vessels]]'' *''[[The Rebel Alliance—Ships of the Fleet]]'' {{Imo}} *{{FactFile|1|XWI 1-2|T-65 X-Wing Fighter}} {{Imo}} *{{FactFile|12|REG 1-2|The Alliance Regroups}} {{Imo}} *''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]'' *''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' *[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Prima Official Game Guide|''Star Wars: Empire at War'': Prima Official Game Guide]] *[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption Expansion: Prima Official Game Guide|''Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption Expansion'': Prima Official Game Guide]] *[[Starships of the Galaxy (Saga Edition)|''Starships of the Galaxy'', Saga Edition]] *''[[Rebellion Era Campaign Guide]]'' *{{StarshipsVehiclesCite|24|Star Wars A–Z}} {{Imo}} *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' *''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'' *[[Star Wars: Age of Rebellion Core Rulebook|''Star Wars: Age of Rebellion'' Core Rulebook]] {{Imo}} *[[Stay on Target (sourcebook)|''Stay on Target'']] {{Imo}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{GCW Fresia}} {{Interlang |de=Schlacht von Fresia |es=Batalla de Fresia }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Fresia, battle of}} [[Category:Battles of Fresia]] [[Category:Battles of the Fresian campaign]]
